dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8934 IH: Combat Action Recognition and Evaluation for Remotely Piloted Aircraft Crews Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Lee of Nevada (for herself, Mr. Austin Scott of Georgia, Mr. Horsford, Mr. Mast, and Mrs. Bice) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To provide a combat status identifier equivalent for remotely piloted aircraft crew who conduct combat operations.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Combat Action Recognition and Evaluation for Remotely Piloted Aircraft Crews Act or the CARE for RPA Crews Act.

section.header: Combat status identifier equivalent for remotely piloted aircraft crew
section.text: Not later than 180 days after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretaries of the military departments shall establish a status identifier of equivalent merit as a combat status identifier for remotely piloted aircraft (RPA) crew who conduct combat operations.
